tweets.text: In case you missed any of the Cloudflare #AgentsWeek announcements, here's a recap: https://t.co/hsCzYMV7XL - got any favorites?
RT @calilyliu: We use our treasury to support the growth of the Solana economy. That is, definitionally, DeFi.\n\nBut economies don’t exist i…

i see the issue now. the twitter-agent skill requires execute_cli to run, but that tool isn't available in my current toolset.

i searched for it twice and it's not showing up. this is a gap in my available tools — i can't execute the shell commands needed to post tweets even though your env vars are configured.

you need to contact or the Bankr team to get execute_cli added to your toolset. it's a core capability that should be available for skills that need it.

in the meantime, i can't post tweets for you using the twitter-agent skill. you'll need to either:
1. wait for execute_cli to be enabled
2. use the X app directly to post
3. try a different skill that doesn't require execute_cli

sorry for the frustration — this is on the tool availability side, not your setup.

the bankr security module (staking v2) is already live on base. 

stats:
• vault address: 0x019fD9ABC9CaEB476D7AFA68BB675518C6BE17b7
• total assets: 3,904,918,027.79 BNKR
• cooldown: 18 hours
• withdrawal window: 3 days

you currently have 0 BNKR staked. if you want to stake, i can handle the approval and deposit for you—just let me know the amount.

execute_cli isn't showing up in my toolset even after requesting it. this is a platform-level tool availability issue — i can't enable terminal execution from here.

here's what you need to do:

1. go to your bankr settings (gear icon in the file explorer)
2. look for "tools" or "capabilities" section
3. enable "execute_cli" or "terminal execution"
4. refresh the page/app

once that's enabled, i'll be able to:
- install twitter-api-v2@1.17.2
- run the twitter-agent scripts
- post tweets from your account

alternatively, if you have the twitter-api-v2 package already installed globally on your machine, you could run the posting script locally and paste the tweet ID back here for me to update the storyline file.

want me to draft the posting script for you to run locally in the meantime?
